title: To His Sister-In-Law, M. Susanna Herrick.
content:
The person crowns the place; your lot doth fall
    Last, yet to be with these a principal.
    Howe'er it fortuned; know for truth, I meant
    You a fore-leader in this testament.
meaning:
"To His Sister-In-Law, M. Susanna Herrick." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
